findings.location: s1 — HTTPアクセスログの出力例 section
findings.description: The actual log output example code block is entirely missing. The source contains a multi-line log showing all four log entries (BEGIN, PARAMETERS, DISPATCHING CLASS, END) with concrete values including masked passwords (########), nablarch_token, and timing data. This is the primary content of the 'HTTPアクセスログの出力例' section and is essential for users to understand what the actual log output looks like.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains: `2011-03-03 19:35:47.848 -INFO- ACC [...] @@@@ BEGIN @@@@` ... `@@@@ PARAMETERS @@@@` ... `@@@@ DISPATCHING CLASS @@@@` ... `@@@@ END @@@@` with all parameter values and masked password fields (########)

findings.description: `HttpAccessLogFormatter` PascalCase class name is referenced in the source (in the app-log.properties comment `# HttpAccessLogFormatterの設定`) but is absent from the hints array.
